# llms.txt for Ankit Karmakar Portfolio

Website: https://ankit-karmakar.tech
Location: Kolkata, India
Role: Full-Stack App Developer, App and IoT Associate

## Identity
- Name: Ankit Karmakar
- Education: BCA Student, RCCIIT
- Current Roles:
  - App and IoT Associate at RCCTechz
  - Tech Team Member at RCCIIT ACM Student Chapter

## Capabilities
- Full-stack web development
- Cross-platform mobile app development
- AI API integration and automation
- IoT system integration (hardware + software)
- Rapid MVP development and hackathon execution

## Skills and Tech Stack
- Languages: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, TypeScript, C++, Java, Python
- Web/App: React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, Express.js, Tailwind CSS
- Tools and Databases: Firebase, Supabase, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Git, GitHub, Docker

## Projects
1. FOODYcare
   - Food delivery app integrated with NGOs to reduce food waste.
   - Stack: React Native, Node.js, Express, MongoDB

2. HACKINTAKE
   - Hackathon app with role-based access, team management, and secure authentication.
   - Stack: React Native, Expo, Firebase, Zustand

3. SHAKTI
   - Women's safety website with instant alerts, location tracking, and emergency resources.
   - Stack: Next.js, Node.js, Tailwind CSS, MongoDB

## Achievements
- 4x Hackathon Winner
- Winner: DoubleSlash 4.0
- Winner: NextGen Hacks
